creator: murray@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

I've added a list of packages that should not be included on any of 
the release CDROMs to src/release/scripts/print-cdrom-packages.sh. 
Theoretically, this list will be consulted by the REs in the future to 
make sure net/cvsupit is not included on the CDs (until sysinstall is 
fixed).
